commit.message:
feat: add model v3 support with image alignment and multi-version pipeline

- Add image alignment via template matching (NCC) to correct camera drift
  before cropping, running as a permanent pipeline step on every invocation
- Support multi-version model classification with per-version manifests,
  analysis JSON, and independent ONNX model loading (v3+ uses mountain
  sub-crop for visibility)
- Extract DaylightCalculator for shared sunrise/sunset computation
- Remove redundant CloudFront behavior covered by wildcard pattern
- Clean up dead config keys and unused dependencies
- Add model comparison tool for evaluating version differences
- One-off v3 training scripts preserved on v3-one-off-scripts branch

commit.message:
fix: thru derivation for suspended/partial rounds, unlock deadline for testing

ESPN state="post" means current round is done, not tournament complete.
Previous logic blanket-set thru="F" for all golfers whenever any round
ended. Now per-golfer hole count is always the primary thru source, and
the "complete" fallback only fires post-R4.

Also moves PICKS_DEADLINE to 2026-04-01 so view-teams feature is testable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix duplicate prospect entries by stripping name suffixes (#61)

* Add boom/bust model validation and feature importance to Model Docs

- Compute LOSO metrics for boom/bust overlay models (AUC, accuracy,
  precision, recall) from cross-validated predictions
- Extract feature importance from boom/bust ridge coefficients
- New Model Docs section showing side-by-side boom vs bust cards:
  - Base rates, AUC, accuracy, precision, recall
  - Top 5 features driving each prediction with importance bars
- Helps understand what profile signals boom (outperform) vs bust
  (underperform) — features that predict variance, not level

https://claude.ai/code/session_012XMq5WJvLjfKMRazFJR3Mg

* Fix duplicate prospect entries by stripping name suffixes (Jr, Sr, etc)

Omar Cooper Jr. appeared twice because the local normalizeName in
RookieProspectsView didn't strip suffixes like "Jr", "Sr", "II", etc.
The shared normalizeName in featureTypes.ts already did this, but the
local copy was missing it. Also handles curly apostrophes.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012XMq5WJvLjfKMRazFJR3Mg

LN metastasis 2.4% vs 44.3% (p=0.0005), RF classifier 97.6% accuracy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.0.2: Frequency-aware ATC, approach detection, arrival sequencing

- Frequency mismatch detection: pilots calling the wrong service (e.g. Tower
  on Approach freq) are instructed to switch with VHF/UHF freqs spoken
  digit-by-digit
- Service boundary enforcement: LLM redirects taxi requests on Tower to
  Ground, takeoff requests on Ground to Tower, etc.
- Geometric approach detection from Tacview: identifies aircraft on landing
  approach to either runway end by heading, bearing, altitude, and speed
  (100-400kts floor covers C-130 through fast jets)
- Proactive traffic conflict warnings: monitors #1 in pattern vs unannounced
  radar traffic, warns on runway incursion or <30s TTD convergence, then
  clears to land once threat passes
- Arrival sequence management: auto-built from all inbound aircraft sorted
  by distance, promotes #2 to #1 with landing clearance when preceding
  aircraft lands and vacates
- Stale strip cleanup: purges crashed/disconnected aircraft after 30s with
  no Tacview update, cleans all queues and monitor state
- Runway detection corridor narrowed to 18m from centerline to prevent
  taxiing aircraft from false runway occupancy

fix: make kiosk services survive reboot and manual restart

- service.sh start: bootstrap if not loaded, kickstart if already loaded
  (previously kickstart-only, which silently failed after reboot)
- service.sh stop: use SIGTERM instead of bootout to keep services
  registered so subsequent start works
- service.sh restart: full bootout+bootstrap cycle for clean restarts
- kiosk.sh: clean up stale Chrome lock files on startup to prevent
  "profile in use" errors after unclean shutdown

commit.message:
Add live T/D gameplay tracing: server-side audit log + client debug panel

Server-side:
- New todTrace table logs every T/D mutation (submitChoice, submitResponse,
  advanceTurn, skipTurn, submitRating) with participant, timestamp, detail
- getTrace/getTraceByRoom queries for reading logs reactively

Client-side:
- tod-debug-panel.tsx: toggleable floating panel showing real-time trace
  - Client tab: button clicks, mutation start/ok/error with latency
  - Server tab: Convex mutation log (reactive subscription)
- All T/D handlers in room page wrapped with tracedMutation() for timing
- Truth/Dare and Submit Rating button clicks traced at point-of-click
- Reactive query state changes traced (status, turnStatus, turnId)
- Also logs to browser console for DevTools debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: pipeline integration tests + parse error handling

- Added 5 pipeline integration tests with mocked fetchers/DB:
  happy path, partial failure, all fail, idempotent, NaN handling
- Added parse validation to all 4 fetchers:
  - PortWatch: validates n_total is number >= 0, date is valid epoch
  - FRED: validates value is finite > 0, checks staleness (90d/60d)
  - Approval: validates NaN, logs which regex pattern matched
  - Yahoo Finance: validates prices > 0, 30d return within [-0.5, 0.5]
- All fetchers now log one-line summaries on success for Vercel observability
- 18 tests total (13 existing + 5 new), all passing

commit.message:
[do] Core v0.2.0 — complete platform with 36 CLI commands, 170+ tests, 11 field types

Rename buildbox → do-core across all 45 files. Module: github.com/do-platform/do-core

Features added this session:
- Keyboard shortcuts (g+d, g+N, /, n, j/k, x, Cmd+K, ?)
- Command palette with global search API
- Bulk actions (multi-select, bulk delete/update)
- Inline cell editing (double-click)
- Webhook trigger testing UI with dry-run
- Entity relationship graph (SVG DAG)
- Undo support (revert to previous version via audit)
- SSE live updates (notification bell + sidebar counts)
- Dashboard sparklines with trend arrows
- Activity log page with filters
- API docs page (interactive endpoints)
- Settings page
- Webhooks management page
- Admin page (user management, role change, suspend)
- Plugin hooks (before/after mutation webhooks)
- Field permissions (viewRoles/editRoles, backend-enforced)
- Computed fields (backend expression evaluation)
- Field validation (min/max/minLength/maxLength/pattern)
- File upload with preview
- Markdown field with safe preview renderer
- Date picker, color picker, geo field types
- CSV import/export alongside JSON
- Entity cloning/duplication
- Breadcrumb navigation
- Loading skeletons (pulse animation)
- Empty state SVG illustrations
- Theming (do-theme.json → custom colors/logo)
- PWA (manifest, service worker, installable)
- Confirm dialogs (replace window.confirm)
- Generated Vitest tests
- Notification bell with SSE + polling fallback
- Custom domain support (Route53 + ACM via CDK)

CLI commands added: watch, deploy, publish, diff, clone, migrate, test,
doctor, info, env, upgrade, snapshot, restore, theme, completion, add-hook

Distribution: cross-compile Makefile, Homebrew formula, GitHub Actions release workflow
Landing page: docs/index.html with dark mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CI cache to stop full rebuilds on every precompute change (#59)

* Add boom/bust overlay models for rookie outlier prediction

Trains secondary classifiers that predict which rookies will significantly
outperform or underperform their base model projection:

- Boom = actual PPG > predicted + MAE (outperform by 1+ MAE)
- Bust = actual PPG < predicted - MAE (underperform by 1+ MAE)
- LOSO cross-validated: second pass uses regression residuals to define
  boom/bust labels, then trains GBM+Ridge binary classifiers
- Final models trained on all data for 2026 prospect scoring

Two rookies can have the same tier/score but different risk profiles:
high boom% = upside pick, high bust% = risky investment.

UI updates:
- Backtest: Boom% and Bust% columns with checkmarks when correct
- Prospects: Boom and Bust columns showing outlier probabilities

https://claude.ai/code/session_012XMq5WJvLjfKMRazFJR3Mg

* Fix CI cache key to stop triggering full rebuilds on every change

The cache key included hashFiles('scripts/precompute-features.ts') which
meant ANY change to the precompute script (model cache bumps, tier
adjustments, boom/bust models) invalidated the cache and triggered a
40+ minute full data rebuild.

The training rows cache file itself has a version (v28) that controls
when features are rebuilt. The CI cache just needs to persist the
public/data/ directory — no hash needed.

Bumped to v13 to establish a fresh cache baseline.

https://claude.ai/code/session_012XMq5WJvLjfKMRazFJR3Mg

---------

commit.message:
fix(security): upgrade Next.js 14.2.3 → 16.2.2 to patch CVE-2025-29927

CVE-2025-29927 (CVSS 9.1) — Next.js middleware authorization bypass via
x-middleware-subrequest header. Fixed in 14.2.25+/15.2.3+/16.x.

Upgraded to 16.2.2 (latest stable). Added .npmrc with legacy-peer-deps=true
to resolve eslint-config-next@16 peer conflict with eslint@8 (dev-only,
not used during build).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
